list.title: Sensitive details review
list.subtitle: Review pending changes for employees in stores you manage.
list.emptyDescription: New employee submissions will appear here.

detail.title: Review sensitive details
detail.securityNotice: Full values are shown only in this authorized review. Verify every changed field before deciding.
detail.previewUnavailable: Photo on file; secure preview is unavailable

dialog.approveDescription: The submitted sensitive details will replace the confirmed employee details.
dialog.rejectDescription: The confirmed details will stay unchanged. Give the employee a clear reason.

messages.listLoadFailed: Review requests could not be loaded.
messages.detailLoadFailed: Review details could not be loaded.
messages.retryHint: Check the connection and try again.
messages.permissionChanged: Your review access has changed. Refresh your permissions or contact an administrator.
messages.conflict: This request or the confirmed details changed. The latest state was loaded and the old action is disabled.
messages.reviewFailed: The review could not be saved. Try again.

privacy.title: Sensitive details hidden
privacy.description: Rechecking your review access before showing this page.
privacy.refreshFailed: The details remain hidden because access could not be rechecked.
